styles.label: Pain point odaklı
styles.instruction: Focus the email on the company's specific pain points from the research. Lead with their biggest challenge, then position your service as the solution.

styles.label: Momentum odaklı
styles.instruction: Lead with a recent win or milestone from the research (funding, launch, growth). Connect their momentum to a new operational challenge your service solves.

styles.label: Daha kısa (2-3 cümle)
styles.instruction: Rewrite the email in 2-3 sentences maximum. Keep only the single strongest hook. End with one direct question.

styles.label: Resmi ton
styles.instruction: Use a more formal, professional tone. Avoid contractions and casual language. Keep it concise but corporate-appropriate.

styles.label: Merak uyandıran
styles.instruction: Open with a counterintuitive insight or unexpected observation about the company. Make them curious enough to reply. Do not pitch directly — let the question do the work.
